security_sage_ideas.name: anon_security_definer_function_executable
security_sage_ideas.detail: Function `public.subscribe(p_email text, p_source text)` can be executed by the `anon` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/subscribe`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

security_sage_ideas.name: authenticated_security_definer_function_executable
security_sage_ideas.detail: Function `public.can_access_engagement(eng uuid)` can be executed by the `authenticated` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/can_access_engagement`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

security_sage_ideas.name: authenticated_security_definer_function_executable
security_sage_ideas.detail: Function `public.current_role_app()` can be executed by the `authenticated` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/current_role_app`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

security_sage_ideas.name: authenticated_security_definer_function_executable
security_sage_ideas.detail: Function `public.is_admin(uid uuid)` can be executed by the `authenticated` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/is_admin`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

security_sage_ideas.name: authenticated_security_definer_function_executable
security_sage_ideas.detail: Function `public.is_org_member(org uuid)` can be executed by the `authenticated` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/is_org_member`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

security_sage_ideas.name: authenticated_security_definer_function_executable
security_sage_ideas.detail: Function `public.subscribe(p_email text, p_source text)` can be executed by the `authenticated` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/subscribe`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

security_sage_ideas.name: auth_leaked_password_protection
security_sage_ideas.detail: Supabase Auth prevents the use of compromised passwords by checking against HaveIBeenPwned.org. Enable this feature to enhance security.

performance_sage_ideas.name: auth_rls_initplan
performance_sage_ideas.detail: Table \`public.profiles\` has a row level security policy \`admins all access\` that re-evaluates current_setting() or auth.<function>() for each row. This produces suboptimal query performance at scale. Resolve the issue by replacing \`auth.<function>()\` with \`(select auth.<function>())\`. See [docs](https://supabase.com/docs/guides/database/postgres/row-level-security#call-functions-with-select) for more info.

performance_sage_ideas.detail: Table \`public.stripe_subscriptions\` has a row level security policy \`stripe_subs_admin_all\` that re-evaluates current_setting() or auth.<function>() for each row. See [docs](https://supabase.com/docs/guides/database/postgres/row-level-security#call-functions-with-select) for more info.
